title: Efficacy and safety of trastuzumab deruxtecan in the treatment of HER2-positive advanced or metastatic gastric or gastroesophageal cancer: a meta-analysis of single-arm trials.
abstract: Trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd) has demonstrated clinical activity in HER2-positive advanced gastric and gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma following trastuzumab failure. However, variability across studies has limited a comprehensive assessment of its efficacy and safety.
trial_name: Trastuzumab deruxtecan in previously treated HER2-positive gastric cancer
